projectDescription: A two-player browser-based dice game where players roll, accumulate points, and race to reach 100 before their opponent.
keyFeatures: Visual dice rendering using CSS dots
Current and global score tracking per player
Turn-based gameplay: rolling a 1 forfeits the current score and switches turns
Hold mechanic: bank your current score to the global total and pass the turn
First player to reach 100 points wins
Responsive design for mobile and desktop
Express.js static file server for easy hosting
publicApiSurface: beginGame() — resets all scores and gives the turn to Player 1
generateRandomFace() — rolls the dice, generates a random number 1-6, updates current score
handleHoldScore() — banks the current player's score to global and passes the turn
showDiceFaceGenerated() — renders the correct dot pattern on the visual dice
keepRoundScore(cs) — adds the rolled number to the current score, or resets on 1
keepGlobalScore(cs, gs, player) — adds current score to global, checks for win condition
checkDotPlayerPosition() — determines which player currently holds the turn
generateRandomInt(min, max) — utility to generate a random integer in range
